examples: Who could turn down an innocent fourth grader?
When he was a fourth-grader, he found his brother's paper folding book.
Chen used to fold paper himself until he met Li Changnan, an eighth grader in his school who also loved folding paper.
Britny Alvarado, a 15-year-old eleventh grader in Connecticut, is building up her ringtone collection.
But because of her large size as a third-grader, she had to shop in the adult section.
